---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Mattin AI
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature or improvement you are requesting. What problem does it solve or what value does it add?

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? Describe the use case or workflow that would benefit. If this is related to a frustration or limitation you have encountered, describe it here.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine the feature working. Be as specific as you can — API changes, UI interactions, configuration options, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? Why do you prefer the proposed solution?

## Affected Area(s)

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Backend (FastAPI, services, models)
- [ ] Frontend (React UI, playground)
- [ ] Agent execution / LangChain / LangGraph
- [ ] RAG / vector stores / silos
- [ ] MCP (server or client)
- [ ] Authentication / authorisation
- [ ] API (internal or public)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / Docker

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, diagrams, references to similar features in other tools, or links to related discussions that might help maintainers understand the request.
